---
title: "Events"
description: "Conferences, workshops, and sessions organized or endorsed by ISA RC42 Social Psychology."
---

## RC42 Events

Conferences, workshops, panels, and sessions organized by or relevant to RC42 Social Psychology.

### Upcoming Events

::: {.event-card}
::: {.card-tag}
Congress
:::
::: {.card-title}
XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027
:::
::: {.card-text}
The XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology is a major upcoming event. RC42 Social Psychology will participate with sessions organized by the Program Coordinator, Juan Carlos Castillo. Detailed session information will be published as it becomes available.
:::
::: {.card-date}
📅 Dates to be confirmed · 📍 Location to be confirmed
:::
:::

::: {.placeholder-notice}
Additional events will be listed as they are submitted and approved. To submit an event, use the [contribution form](../participate/submit-contribution.qmd).
:::

### Past Events

::: {.placeholder-notice}
A listing of past RC42 events (conference sessions, workshops, etc.) will be added as information becomes available. If you have records of past RC42 events, please [contact the board](../contact/index.qmd).
:::

---

### Submit an Event

If you know of an event relevant to the RC42 community, please submit it through the [contribution form](../participate/submit-contribution.qmd).
